mapper.select: select cs.id, cs.merchant_id, cs.group_id, cs.create_time, cs.spec_name, cs.state, csg.group_name as groupName, cmi.merchant_name as merchantName from cm_specification cs left join cm_specification_group csg on cs.group_id = csg.id left join cm_merchant_info cmi on cs.merchant_id = cmi.id where cmi.deleted = '0' and cs.group_id = #{groupId} order by cs.create_time desc
select id from cm_specification where merchant_id = #{merchantId} order by create_time desc

select cs.id, cs.merchant_id, cs.group_id, cs.create_time, cs.spec_name, cs.state, csg.group_name as groupName, cmi.merchant_name as merchantName from cm_product_spec cps left join cm_specification cs on cps.spec_id = cs.id left join cm_specification_group csg on cs.group_id = csg.id left join cm_merchant_info cmi on cs.merchant_id = cmi.id where cs.deleted = '0' and cs.state = '1' and cmi.deleted = '0' and cps.product_id = #{productId} order by cs.create_time desc

select cs.id, cs.merchant_id, cs.group_id, cs.create_time, cs.spec_name, cs.state, csg.group_name as groupName, cmi.merchant_name as merchantName from cm_specification cs left join cm_specification_group csg on cs.group_id = csg.id left join cm_merchant_info cmi on cs.merchant_id = cmi.id where cs.deleted = '0' and cmi.deleted = '0' and cs.merchant_id = #{merchantId}

select count(*) from cm_product_spec cps left join cm_product cp on cps.product_id = cp.id where cp.deleted = '0' and cp.shelve_state = '1' and cps.spec_id in
#{id}
mapper.update:
update cm_specification set deleted = '1' where id in
#{id}
